(a) In this chapter, “unified carrier registration plan and agreement” means the federal unified carrier registration plan and agreement provided by 49 U.S.C. Section 14504a.

(b) The Texas Department of Motor Vehicles may, to the fullest extent practicable, participate in the unified carrier registration plan and agreement.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 645. Unified Carrier Registration
##### § 645.001 — Federal Unified Carrier Registration; Definition

(a) In this chapter, “unified carrier registration plan and agreement” means the federal unified carrier registration plan and agreement provided by 49 U.S.C. Section 14504a.

(b) The Texas Department of Motor Vehicles may, to the fullest extent practicable, participate in the unified carrier registration plan and agreement.

*Acts 2017, 85th Leg., R.S., Ch. 703 (H.B.3254), Sec. 13, eff. January 1, 2018.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: In this chapter, “unified carrier registration plan and agreement” means the federal unified carrier registration plan and agreement provided by 49 U.S.C. Section 14504a.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: The Texas Department of Motor Vehicles may, to the fullest extent practicable, participate in the unified carrier registration plan and agreement.
